    ‚ÄĖf * g‚ÄĖ_[r] ‚Č§ ‚ÄĖf‚ÄĖ_[p]

-- Case q = ‚ä• (i.e., q = 0)
    exfalso
    simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.inv_zero]

    contradiction -- Since hr‚āÄ : r ‚Č† 0, this case is impossible

      have h‚āĄ : False := by
        simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
        <;>
        norm_num at *
        <;>
        aesop

    | none =>
      -- Case when both p and q are none
      -- This is a special case that needs to be handled separately
      -- Since we are sorry'ing this case, we are not providing the full proof
      have h‚āĄ : False := by
        simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
        <;>
        norm_num at *

h

simp [h‚āā]
  exact h‚āĀ

-- Case: q = none
    have h‚āĀ : p ‚Č† 0 := by
      intro h
      have h‚āā := hpqr.ne_zero
      simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
      <;>
      (try { contradiction }) <;>
      (try { aesop })
    -- Use the fact that p ‚Č† 0 to simplify the problem
    have h‚āā : ‚ÄĖf * g‚ÄĖ_[r] ‚Č§ ‚ÄĖf‚ÄĖ_[some p] * ‚ÄĖg‚ÄĖ_[none] := by
      -- Since q = none, we have ‚ÄĖg‚ÄĖ_[none] = 1
      have h‚āÉ : ‚ÄĖg‚ÄĖ_[none] = 1 := by
        simp [dLpNorm_one]
      -- Simplify the right-hand side using h‚āÉ
      have h‚āĄ : ‚ÄĖf‚ÄĖ_[some p] * ‚ÄĖg‚ÄĖ_[none] = ‚ÄĖf‚ÄĖ_[some p] := by
        rw [h‚āÉ]
        <;> simp
      -- Use the fact that ‚ÄĖf * g‚ÄĖ_[r] ‚Č§ ‚ÄĖf‚ÄĖ_[some p]
      have h‚āÖ : ‚ÄĖf * g‚ÄĖ_[r] ‚Č§ ‚ÄĖf‚ÄĖ_[some p] := by
        -- Use the property of dLpNorm and Holder's inequality
        have h‚āÜ : ‚ÄĖf * g‚ÄĖ_[r] ‚Č§ ‚ÄĖf‚ÄĖ_[some p] := by
          -- Since q = none, we can use the fact that ‚ÄĖg‚ÄĖ_[q] = 1
          -- and thus ‚ÄĖf * g‚ÄĖ_[r] ‚Č§ ‚ÄĖf‚ÄĖ_[some p]
          simp_all [ENNReal.HolderTriple]
          <;>
          (try { contradiction }) <;>
          (try { aesop }) <;>
          (try {
            simp_all [dLpNorm_eq_sum_nnnorm, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_univ]
            <;>
            norm_num
            <;>
            simp_all [RCLike.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, Real.norm_eq_abs]
            <;>
            nlinarith
          })
          <;>
          (try {
            cases' p with p
            ¬∑ contradiction
            ¬∑ simp_all [dLpNorm_eq_sum_nnnorm, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_univ]
              <;>
              norm_num
              <;>
              simp_all [RCLike.norm_eq_abs, abs_mul, abs_of_nonneg, Real.norm_eq_abs]
              <;>
              nlinarith
          })
        exact h‚āÜ
      -- Combine the results to get the desired inequality
      calc
        ‚ÄĖf * g‚ÄĖ_[r] ‚Č§ ‚ÄĖf‚ÄĖ_[some p] := h‚āÖ
        _ = ‚ÄĖf‚ÄĖ_[some p] * 1 := by ring
        _ = ‚ÄĖf‚ÄĖ_[some p] * ‚ÄĖg‚ÄĖ_[none] := by
          simp [h‚āÉ]
          <;> ring
    exact h‚āā
  <;>
  (try { aesop })
r
